brother.en: My brother is older than me.

brown.en: The bear has thick brown fur.
brown.zh: 那隻熊有厚厚的棕色毛。

bug.en: A small bug is crawling on the leaf.

build.en: They will build a new house here.
build.zh: 他們將在這裡蓋一棟新房子。

bus.en: I take the bus to school every day.

business.en: My uncle runs a small business.
business.zh: 我叔叔經營一家小生意。

but.en: I like tea, but I don't like coffee.
but.zh: 我喜歡茶，但我不喜歡咖啡。

butter.en: She spread butter on the bread.

butterfly.en: A colorful butterfly landed on the flower.
butterfly.zh: 一隻色彩繽紛的蝴蝶停在花上。

button.en: Press the button to start the machine.

buy.en: I want to buy a new bag.

by.en: The story was written by a famous author.
by.zh: 這個故事是由一位著名作家寫的。

cake.en: We ate a chocolate cake at the party.
cake.zh: 我們在派對上吃了巧克力蛋糕。

call.en: Please call me when you arrive.
call.zh: 你到的時候請打電話給我。

camera.en: She took photos with her new camera.

camp.en: We set up a camp near the river.

cap.en: He wears a blue cap to play sports.
cap.zh: 他戴著一頂藍色帽子打球。

car.en: My father drives a red car.
car.zh: 我爸爸開一輛紅色的車。

card.en: I sent a birthday card to my friend.
card.zh: 我寄了一張生日卡片給朋友。

careful.en: Be careful when you cross the road.

carry.en: He helped me carry the heavy box.

case.en: The police are working on a difficult case.
case.zh: 警方正在處理一件棘手的案件。

cat.en: The cat is chasing a mouse.
cat.zh: 那隻貓正在追一隻老鼠。

celebrate.en: We celebrate the New Year with our family.
celebrate.zh: 我們和家人一起慶祝新年。

cellphone.en: She talks on her cellphone every evening.
cellphone.zh: 她每天晚上用手機講電話。

cent.en: This candy costs only one cent.

center.en: There is a fountain in the center of the park.

certain.en: I am certain that he will come.

chance.en: This is your last chance to try.
chance.zh: 這是你最後一次嘗試的機會。

change.en: The weather can change very quickly.

cheap.en: These shoes are cheap but good.

check.en: Please check your answers before you finish.
check.zh: 完成前請檢查你的答案。

cheese.en: I like cheese on my pizza.

chicken.en: We had fried chicken for dinner.

child.en: Every child needs love and care.
child.zh: 每個孩子都需要愛與關懷。

chocolate.en: This chocolate tastes sweet and rich.
chocolate.zh: 這塊巧克力嚐起來香甜濃郁。

choose.zh: 請選擇你最喜歡的顏色。

church.en: They go to church every Sunday.
church.zh: 他們每個星期天上教堂。

circle.en: Draw a circle around the right answer.
circle.zh: 在正確答案上畫一個圈。

city.en: Taipei is a busy and modern city.
city.zh: 台北是一座繁忙又現代的城市。

class.en: Our English class starts at nine.
class.zh: 我們的英文課九點開始。

clear.en: The sky is clear after the rain.

clerk.en: The clerk helped me find the book.
clerk.zh: 那位店員幫我找到那本書。

climb.en: The boys like to climb trees.

clock.en: The clock on the wall says ten.

close.en: Please close the window; it's cold.

clothes.en: She is washing her dirty clothes.

cloud.en: A white cloud is floating in the sky.

club.en: I joined the music club at school.
club.zh: 我參加了學校的音樂社。

coat.en: Put on your coat; it is cold outside.

coffee.en: My father drinks coffee every morning.
coffee.zh: 我爸爸每天早上喝咖啡。

cold.en: It is very cold in winter.

collect.en: He likes to collect old coins.

color.zh: 紅色是我最喜歡的顏色。

come.en: Please come to my house after school.

comfortable.en: This sofa is soft and comfortable.

common.en: Rice is a common food in Asia.
common.zh: 米飯是亞洲常見的食物。

computer.en: I use my computer to do homework.

convenient.en: The store is convenient and close to home.
convenient.zh: 這家店很方便，離家很近。

cook.en: My mother can cook delicious meals.
cook.zh: 我媽媽會煮美味的飯菜。

cookie.en: The children shared a box of cookies.
cookie.zh: 孩子們分享了一盒餅乾。

cool.en: The wind is cool in the evening.

copy.en: Please make a copy of this paper.

corner.en: The shop is at the corner of the street.

cost.en: How much does this toy cost?

couch.en: The cat is sleeping on the couch.

count.en: The little girl can count to ten.

course.en: I am taking an English course this year.
course.zh: 我今年在修一門英文課。

cousin.en: My cousin lives in another city.
cousin.zh: 我表哥住在另一個城市。

cover.en: She covered the baby with a blanket.

cow.en: The cow gives us fresh milk.
cow.zh: 乳牛提供我們新鮮的牛奶。

crazy.en: Driving so fast is crazy and dangerous.
crazy.zh: 開這麼快既瘋狂又危險。

cross.en: Look both ways before you cross the road.

cry.en: The baby began to cry loudly.

cup.en: I drank a cup of hot tea.

cut.en: Please cut the cake into eight pieces.

cute.en: The little puppy is very cute.

dance.en: They love to dance at parties.
dance.zh: 他們喜歡在派對上跳舞。

dangerous.en: It is dangerous to play with fire.

dark.en: The room became dark at night.

daughter.en: Their daughter is a clever girl.
daughter.zh: 他們的女兒是個聰明的女孩。

day.en: There are seven days in a week.

dead.en: The old tree has been dead for years.
dead.zh: 那棵老樹已經枯死好幾年了。

deal.zh: 我們做了一筆公平的交易。

dear.en: Dear friend, I miss you very much.
dear.zh: 親愛的朋友，我非常想念你。

decide.en: I can't decide which one to buy.
decide.zh: 我無法決定要買哪一個。

define.en: Can you define this difficult word?

desk.en: My books are on the desk.

dictionary.en: I look up new words in the dictionary.

difficult.en: This math problem is too difficult.

dig.en: The dog likes to dig holes in the yard.
dig.zh: 那隻狗喜歡在院子裡挖洞。

dinner.en: We have dinner at seven o'clock.

dirty.en: Your hands are dirty; go wash them.

dish.en: Please wash the dishes after dinner.

do.en: I do my homework after school.

doctor-doc.en: The doctor gave me some medicine.

dog.en: My dog runs to me when I come home.
dog.zh: 我回家時，我的狗會跑向我。

doll.en: The girl hugs her favorite doll.
doll.zh: 那個女孩抱著她最愛的洋娃娃。

door.en: Please open the door for me.

down.en: The cat ran down the stairs.

draw.en: He likes to draw cars and planes.

dream.en: My dream is to become a pilot.
dream.zh: 我的夢想是成為一名飛行員。

dress.en: She wore a pretty red dress.
dress.zh: 她穿了一件漂亮的紅色洋裝。

drive.en: My mother drives me to school.

driver.en: The bus driver is very friendly.

drop.en: Be careful not to drop the glass.

drum.en: He plays the drum in the band.

dry.en: Hang the wet clothes out to dry.

duck.en: The ducks are swimming in the pond.

during.en: We stayed inside during the storm.
during.zh: 暴風雨期間我們待在室內。

each.en: Each student has a new book.
each.zh: 每位學生都有一本新書。

early.en: I get up early in the morning.

east.en: The sun rises in the east.

easy.en: This game is easy to play.

egg.en: I had a boiled egg for breakfast.
egg.zh: 我早餐吃了一顆水煮蛋。

either.en: You can choose either tea or juice.
either.zh: 你可以選擇茶或果汁其中一種。

elephant.en: An elephant has a long nose.

else.en: Is there anything else you need?

email.en: I sent an email to my teacher.
email.zh: 我寄了一封電子郵件給老師。

end.en: The movie has a happy end.
end.zh: 這部電影有個快樂的結局。

engineer.en: My father is a computer engineer.

enjoy.en: We enjoy playing in the park.

enough.en: We have enough food for everyone.
enough.zh: 我們有足夠的食物給每個人。

enter.en: Please knock before you enter the room.

envelope.en: She put the letter in an envelope.

eraser.zh: 我可以借你的橡皮擦嗎？

error.en: There is one error in your answer.
error.zh: 你的答案裡有一個錯誤。

even.en: He is busy, but he even helps others.
even.zh: 他很忙，但他甚至還幫助別人。

evening.en: We watch TV in the evening.

ever.en: Have you ever been to Japan?

every.en: Every morning I drink a glass of milk.
every.zh: 每天早上我喝一杯牛奶。

everyone-everybody.en: Everyone is happy on the holiday.
everyone-everybody.zh: 假日時每個人都很開心。

everything.en: Everything on the table is for you.
everything.zh: 桌上的所有東西都是給你的。

example.en: Can you give me an example?
example.zh: 你可以給我一個例子嗎？

excellent.en: She did an excellent job on the test.

except.zh: 除了湯姆，每個人都來了。

excited.en: The kids are excited about the trip.
excited.zh: 孩子們對這趟旅行感到興奮。

exciting.en: The basketball game was very exciting.
exciting.zh: 那場籃球比賽非常刺激。

exercise.en: We should exercise every day to stay healthy.
exercise.zh: 我們應該每天運動以保持健康。

expect.en: I expect to see you tomorrow.

expensive.en: This watch is too expensive for me.
expensive.zh: 這支手錶對我來說太貴了。

experience.zh: 旅行帶給我們新的經驗。

explain.en: Can you explain this rule to me?
explain.zh: 你能向我解釋這條規則嗎？

fact.en: It is a fact that the earth is round.
fact.zh: 地球是圓的，這是個事實。

factory.en: My uncle works in a car factory.
factory.zh: 我叔叔在一家汽車工廠工作。

fail.en: Don't give up even if you fail.

fall.en: Leaves fall from the trees in autumn.
fall.zh: 秋天時葉子從樹上落下。

family.en: I love my family very much.

famous.en: He is a famous singer in Taiwan.
famous.zh: 他是台灣一位有名的歌手。

fan.en: Turn on the fan; it is hot.

far.en: The school is not far from my home.

farm.en: Many animals live on the farm.

farmer.en: The farmer grows rice in the field.

fat.en: The cat got fat after eating too much.
fat.zh: 那隻貓吃太多後變胖了。

father.en: My father reads the newspaper every morning.
father.zh: 我爸爸每天早上看報紙。
